CustomField.description: Number of records processed per batch execution during the Contact-to-Account soft credit rollup calculations using the Customizable Rollups engine. This rollup aggregates Contact-level soft credits up to their parent Account. Default is 200. Reduce if the batch job fails due to governor limits.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Records per batch when rolling up Contact soft credits to Accounts. Default is 200. Reduce if the rollup job hits governor limits.
CustomField.label: Contact Soft Credit to Acct Batch Size
